SEARCH
Package net.elena.murat.shape

Class IntersectionCSG

java.lang.Object
net.elena.murat.shape.CSGShape
net.elena.murat.shape.IntersectionCSG
All Implemented Interfaces:
EMShape
public class IntersectionCSG extends CSGShape
Represents a Constructive Solid Geometry (CSG) Intersection operation. The resulting shape is the intersection of two shapes: A ∩ B. A point is inside the intersection only if it is inside both shape A and shape B.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • IntersectionCSG

      public IntersectionCSG(EMShape left, EMShape right)
      Constructs an IntersectionCSG from two shapes.
      Parameters:
      left - The first shape (left operand).
      right - The second shape (right operand).

  • Method Details

    • combine

      protected List<IntersectionInterval> combine(List<IntersectionInterval> a, List<IntersectionInterval> b)
      Combines the intersection intervals of two shapes using the Intersection operation. The intersection is formed by finding intervals where the ray is inside both shapes.
      Specified by:
      combine in class CSGShape
      Parameters:
      a - List of intervals from the left shape.
      b - List of intervals from the right shape.
      Returns:
      The resulting list of intervals for the intersection.
